arts.ttl: Mario Hermoso edges closer to Fenerbahçe move
arts.sum: Mario Hermoso is on the verge of departing Roma, with reports indicating that he is nearing a transfer to Turkish club Fenerbahçe. The former Atlético Madrid defender, who joined Roma on a free transfer last summer, has struggled to make an impact in Italy, making only 13 appearances this season. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the new year dawns, the stage is set for one of the most anticipated fixtures in Italian football: the Derby della Capitale. On Sunday, Roma will host their fierce rivals Lazio at the Stadio Olimpico, with both teams eager to assert their dominance in this historic rivalry. Currently, Roma trail Lazio by 15 points in the Serie A standings, making this match crucial for the Giallorossi as they seek to close the gap. The post Serie A | Roma v Lazio: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.sum: The future of Jacopo Fazzini remains uncertain as Lazio step up their efforts to secure the talented midfielder from Empoli. arts.ttl: Enzo Le Fee move to Real Betis could have Implications for Arthur
arts.sum: Enzo Le Fee's time at Roma appears to be coming to a close, with the midfielder on the brink of a transfer to Real Betis. The 24-year-old, who joined Roma from Rennes for €23 million last summer, has struggled to find his place in the squad under coach Claudio Ranieri, making only ten appearances and totalling just 460 minutes of play.
